character.name: andre_chef
character.prompt: A chibi adult male chef with long wavy black hair and a short beard. He wears a formal white double-breasted chef jacket with gold braid trim and gold buttons (gold color #f5d76e), and black trousers. Wears a tall white toque blanche chef hat. Blue eyes visible. Distinguished and elegant French chef appearance. Holds a whisk in right hand. Low top-down view, 8 directions, chibi proportions.
